nl_query: Which scripts have been through more than one evaluation cycle and have at least one result history correction, showing the script URN, number of cycles, number of corrections, and the latest final marks.
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.urn, COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS num_cycles, COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) AS num_corrections, MAX(r.final_marks) AS latest_final_marks
FROM   answer_script s
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = s.id
JOIN   board b ON b.id = sa.board_id
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.assignment_id = sa.id
JOIN   result r ON r.script_id = s.id
JOIN   result_history rh ON rh.result_id = r.id
WHERE  COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) > 1
  AND  COUNT(DISTINCT rh.id) > 0
GROUP BY s.urn, r.final_marks
ORDER BY num_cycles DESC, num_corrections DESC, latest_final_marks DESC;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: aggregate functions are not allowed in WHERE
LINE 8: WHERE  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) FROM script_assignment s...
                       ^
